summary: REQ-1 (magnetometer calibration workflow + applying calibration to live mag values and MARG fusion) and REQ-2 (always-on dark theme) appear to be implemented based on the updated IMU dashboard logic, added magnetometer calibration utilities, and forced dark-mode styling. The diff also introduces some UI/feature elements that were not explicitly requested (footer attribution and additional calibration workflows).

hallucinated_features.description: Added caffeine.ai attribution/footer branding with icon/link in the app shell.
hallucinated_features.reason: BuildRequest REQ-1/REQ-2 do not ask for adding third-party attribution/branding in the UI.

hallucinated_features.description: Accelerometer calibration and gyroscope calibration workflows/utilities (beyond magnetometer calibration).
hallucinated_features.reason: REQ-1 is specifically about a magnetometer calibration workflow; additional sensor calibration workflows are not requested.
